supplies.title: Daniel Smith Extra Fine Watercolor Pigment: Hansa Yellow
supplies.rationale: Use this brand and exact color to get the same results as the tutorial videos.
supplies.note: Option 1 in the links has a budget-friendly 5ml tube. If you want to buy in larger quantities, the 15 ml is a great value and is available at both options linked.
supplies.maySub: We do not recommend subbing another brand.

supplies.title: Mungyo Soft Pastels
supplies.rationale:
- Art Instruction: for pastel drawing, painting, and color theory lessons. 
- Art History: pieces of brown and other colors will be crushed to make pigment.
supplies.note: Check local arts and crafts stores for sales and coupons.
supplies.maySub: any 24 count or more pastel set. Mungyo brand is a great, inexpensive option for students.

supplies.title: White and Colored Chalk
supplies.rationale:
Crayola chalk is best. Other brands tend to be less intense and full of binder that scratches the board. 

- Art and Picture Study: Used throughout art lessons and picture study for memory drawings.
- Playground Games: Used in playground games to mark the ground for hopscotch, four squares, and other games.
- Lettering: Used for chalk lettering projects.
supplies.usedInText:
Art
Picture Study
Lettering: Levels 1-2
Playground Games
programList: Used across the curriculum in 3 or more subjects.

supplies.title: Beste Golden Taklon Round Brush Set
supplies.rationale: Recommend Beste because they hold up well and economically priced. This set of 6 offers versatility. Students can use the four biggest sizes for lessons, then appropriate sizes for practicing. Should last for years if cared for properly.
supplies.note: Watercolors are best when using brushes with natural fibers. These should not be substituted with the short, stiff bristles of acrylic brushes. Watercolor brushes may be used as a substitute for bamboo brushes used for Sumi-e painting in Art History.
supplies.maySub: any Beste brand golden taklon hair brush. Need at least a size 8 and 12 round for brush drawing.

supplies.title: Easel
supplies.rationale:
- Art: Used to hold drawing board. Students may optionally hold board in lap.
- Sloyd: Optional but highly advisable.
supplies.note: May also be used in lower Art levels to hold art board if using as a chalkboard.
supplies.maySub: any easel similar to a drafting table that allows students to work in an upright position, as opposed to hunching over work and wanting to turn their paper as they are working.

supplies.title: Household Items - Art: Fast Track
supplies.note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
- Cloth (T1/2/3)
- Scrap Cardboard for base of clay (T1)
- Paper towels (T1)
- 12" x 18" white paper (can be drawing, watercolor, or pastel paper) (T1)
- Scrap paper (T1/2)
- Houseplant. Grocery stores often have potted herbs in the produce section. Or pull up a weed and plant it in a cup with dirt from your yard. (T2)
- Manipulatives/found objects (can include pebbles, leaves, Tangram pieces, beans, math counters, Legos, anything that you have enough of to repeat a pattern) (T2)
- Markers or crayons (T2)
- Tea cup and saucer (can use mug and small plate) used for model (T2)
- Basket with handle used for model (T2)
- Lantern used for model. It's on pg.14 of Drawing, Design, and Craftwork. You can use a can with a funnel on top to recreate it. Or make it out of paper. (T2)
- Cylindrical objects of 3 different sizes (cans, candles, vases) (T2)
- Conical objects like flower pot, umbrella, tea pitcher, funnel, etc. Preferably at least 3. (T2)
- 6x6 square piece of paper in any color (T2)
- An item that is an open circle (mason jar lid ring, embroidery hoop, hula hoop) (T2)
- Circle template. Trace around any object at least 4 inches in diameter: bowl, plate, lid, etc., on a sturdy piece of cardboard or cardstock. Cut it out. (T2)
- Canned good (T2)
- Towel (T1/2/3)

supplies.title: Grid Paper Notebook
supplies.rationale:
For fret design. May use for brush-forms as well.
➜ Levels 1-3, Fast Track
supplies.maySub: grid pattern printed on white cardstock.
supplies.usedInText:
Art: Level 1
Art: Level 2
Art: Level 3
Art: Fast Track
